name: Healthspan Connect entered the public registry
summary: Healthspan Connect entered ClinicalTrials.gov as a planned 100,000-participant prospective observational programme on healthy aging and resilience.
significance_note: Marks planned large-scale observational infrastructure for healthy-aging and resilience research. It is not yet recruiting, is not an interventional efficacy signal, and does not show that any intervention improves aging outcomes.

surface_routing.rationale: The programme can inform State of the Field and trial-horizon context as planned observational infrastructure, without changing evidence or outlook surfaces.
